title: Issue 2044 runtime ownership inventory and boundary
lane_outcome: Inventory command-specific runtime ownership, define the allowed primitive/temporary-exception boundary at symbol granularity, and establish the contract vocabulary required for migration.
purpose_for_parent: Creates the authoritative baseline that every later migration and checker uses.
technical_strategy: Tighten the lane strategy before the first slice starts.
acceptance_boundary: All lane slices have landed, lane proof aggregation is satisfied, and residual work is routed.
proof_strategy: Review the inventory against representative commands; prove that unclassified command semantics and invalid exception records are rejected.
